segments.text: Why do kids toothbrush look like fat [music] squishy toys while adult toothbrush look like this? It's not just to look cute. In fact, the companies who
were making adult toothbrush were making a massive mistakes from decades. [music]
They assumed small hand just need tiny skinny handles. But this was a disaster.
Kids kept dropping them making brushing a total nightmare for their parents. So,
a design company called IDO decided to actually watch kids brush in their homes. [music] And they found a massive flaw. Adults hold toothbrush nicely with
their fingertips. But young kids don't have that fine motor control yet. So they grab things with a tight full fist.
And the tiny skinny handle tucked inside that tight fist is impossible to control. So ID did the exact [music]
opposite. They created a fat squishy handle that perfectly fits a kid's fist.
No more dropping and a billiondoll redesign was born. For more amazing design content, subscribe.
